message: chore: upgrade log4j-core 2.13.3 → 2.14.1 for performance improvements
body:
Upgrades log4j-core and log4j-api from 2.13.3 to 2.14.1.
Release notes cite async logging throughput improvements (20% faster).
No security advisory was available at time of merge.

diff_summary.payment-service/pom.xml: No direct version override — inherits from parent pom.xml
diff_summary.payment-worker/pom.xml: No direct version override — inherits from parent pom.xml

message: feat: add structured logging for payment events using MDC context
body:
Adds Mapped Diagnostic Context (MDC) to payment controller for trace correlation.
Logs user-supplied data (transaction ID, merchant name) into MDC fields.
Note: this change causes user-controlled data to be passed through log4j formatters.

diff_summary.PaymentController.java:
+MDC.put("userAgent", request.getHeader("User-Agent"));
+log.info("Processing payment request from agent: {}", request.getHeader("User-Agent"));

pr_title: feat: Enhanced payment logging with MDC

message: ci: add integration tests for payment controller endpoints
body:
Adds integration tests covering the main payment flow.
All tests pass locally and in CI.

message: fix: handle null merchant name in payment request gracefully
body: Prevents NullPointerException when merchant_name field is missing from request body.

message: hotfix: set log4j2.formatMsgNoLookups=true to mitigate CVE-2021-44228
body:
Emergency mitigation for Log4Shell (CVE-2021-44228).
Sets -Dlog4j2.formatMsgNoLookups=true in JVM startup args.
Full remediation (upgrade to 2.15.0) tracked in PAY-442.
